context: Evaluates the agent's ability to adapt later questions to prior answers instead of following a fixed script, and to recap and confirm before finalizing.

checklist.name: Adapts to prior answer
checklist.description: The next question is visibly reshaped by the 'serverless' answer rather than repeating a now-moot planned question

checklist.name: Still one question at a time
checklist.description: Only a single question is asked in the turn following the answer

checklist.name: Bulleted recap presented
checklist.description: A short bulleted summary of answers given so far is presented before finalizing

checklist.name: Explicit confirmation requested
checklist.description: The agent explicitly asks the user to confirm or correct the recap before producing a final output
